title: Integrated Capabilities
text: Our Strategic Development Planning and Experimentation office’s Rapid Dragon is taking palletized munitions to the next level. Watch to learn more about how this system is testing the feasibility and operational advantages of airdropping long-range, palletized munitions form exiting airlift platforms. Lockheed Martin courtesy video, shown at the Air Force Association’s Air, Space and Cyber (ASC) Conference.
